sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_divide (value1 Float64, value2 Float64);
SELECT value1, value2, divide(value1, value2) AS quotient FROM test_divide;
UPDATE test_divide SET value1 = divide(value1, 2.0) WHERE value2 > 0;
SELECT value1, value2, divide(value1 + 5.0, value2 - 3.0) AS adjusted_quotient FROM test_divide;
